test_metadata.description: Comprehensive test contract covering healthcare, pricing, water resources, environment, organization, and reporting - designed to match diverse ingested documents

expected_findings.clause_title: DỊCH VỤ Y TẾ VÀ CHĂM SÓC SỨC KHỎE

relevance_notes.105/2000/QĐ-UB: Huy động lực lượng ngành Y tế - matches clause 1.2 about emergency mobilization
relevance_notes.115/SL: Viện Thú y (veterinary/health related) - related to health services
relevance_notes.69/SL: Nha lâm chính và Nha thú y - historical health administration

expected_issues: Healthcare service mobilization should reference Decision 105/2000/QĐ-UB
Missing specification of emergency response procedures
Budget allocation mechanism unclear

expected_findings.clause_title: QUẢN LÝ GIÁ CẢ VÀ DỊCH VỤ CÔNG CỘNG

relevance_notes.166/1999/QĐ-UB: Quy định giá dịch vụ giữ xe - clause 2.2 specifies 2.000 VNĐ but Decision may have different rates
relevance_notes.157/1999/QĐ-UB: Quy định phí chợ - clause 2.2 market fees (40.000-120.000 VNĐ) must comply
relevance_notes.28/1999/CT-UB: Niêm yết giá và thanh toán bằng đồng Việt Nam - matches clause 2.3

expected_issues: CRITICAL: Parking fee (2.000 VNĐ for motorbike) may not match Decision 166/1999/QĐ-UB official rate
CRITICAL: Market stall fees must follow Decision 157/1999/QĐ-UB price framework
Price display requirement matches Directive 28/1999/CT-UB but should be explicitly cited
Contract specifies fixed prices instead of referencing official price lists

expected_findings.clause_title: QUẢN LÝ TÀI NGUYÊN NƯỚC VÀ THỦY LỢI

relevance_notes.114/1999/QĐ-UB: Quy hoạch thủy lợi và nước sinh hoạt nông thôn - directly matches clause 3.1 and 3.2
relevance_notes.118: Sắc lệnh về Nha thuỷ lâm - historical water resource management

expected_issues: Water resource management should cite Decision 114/1999/QĐ-UB
Irrigation planning requires provincial approval
Budget amount (800M VNĐ) needs legal basis
Prohibited activities list is good but should reference specific regulations

expected_findings.clause_title: BẢO VỆ MÔI TRƯỜNG VÀ KHAI THÁC KHOÁNG SẢN

relevance_notes.181/1999/QĐ-UB: Ký quỹ phục hồi môi trường trong khai thác khoáng sản - clause 4.2 specifies 1 billion VNĐ but Decision may require different amount

expected_issues: CRITICAL: Environmental deposit (1.000.000.000 VNĐ) must match Decision 181/1999/QĐ-UB requirements exactly
CRITICAL: Mining without proper environmental deposit is explicitly prohibited
Environmental restoration plan requires provincial approval per regulations
Penalty amounts (20-100M VNĐ) should reference legal basis
Missing specification of mining license requirements
rationale_keywords: ký quỹ phục hồi môi trường

expected_findings.clause_title: TỔ CHỨC BỘ MÁY VÀ QUẢN LÝ NHÂN SỰ

relevance_notes.75/1999/QĐ-UB: Chức năng, nhiệm vụ, quyền hạn tổ chức bộ máy - matches clause 5.2
relevance_notes.99/QĐ-UB: Phân cấp quản lý công tác Tổ chức và Cán bộ - matches clause 5.3
relevance_notes.171/1999/QĐ-UB: Thành lập Ban quản lý dự án - matches clause 5.1

expected_issues: Project management board establishment should cite Decision 171/1999/QĐ-UB
Organization structure must reference Decision 75/1999/QĐ-UB
Cadre management should cite Decision 99/QĐ-UB
Provincial approval required before implementation

expected_findings.clause_title: BÁO CÁO VÀ THANH TRA KIỂM TRA

relevance_notes.85/SL: Cải cách bộ máy Tư pháp và Luật Tố tụng - related to inspection procedures
relevance_notes.76/SL: Quy chế Công chức - relevant to reporting obligations

expected_issues: Reporting deadlines are well-defined but should cite specific regulation
Inspection authority should reference legal basis
Good specification of report content and frequency

expected_findings.clause_title: XỬ LÝ VI PHẠM VÀ KHUYẾN KHÍCH

relevance_notes.28/1999/CT-UB: Vi phạm niêm yết giá - matches clause 7.1 price violation penalty
relevance_notes.181/1999/QĐ-UB: Vi phạm môi trường - matches clause 7.1 environmental penalty

expected_issues: Penalty amounts should reference specific legal basis
Price violation penalty (10-30M VNĐ) should cite Directive 28/1999/CT-UB
Environmental penalty (20-100M VNĐ) should cite Decision 181/1999/QĐ-UB
Incentive mechanism (10% reward) needs legal framework
Good inclusion of both penalties and incentives

total_pipeline_time_seconds.notes: 7 clauses with multiple domains should take longer than simple contract

clause_parsing_time_seconds.notes: Regex-based parsing should be fast regardless of contract length

known_challenges: Healthcare clause may be difficult to match with limited ingested health documents
Water/irrigation documents are sparse in the dataset
Historical Sắc lệnh from 1950s have different legal context
Penalty amounts in contract may differ from legal requirements
